name: NM
title: HL7 v2 NM Data Type
description: A number represented as a series of ASCII numeric characters consisting of an optional leading sign (+ or -), the digits, and an optional decimal point. The total length of the value must be between 1 and 16 characters. At least one digit is required. Any value containing a decimal point must include at least one digit to the left of the decimal point.

element.definition: A number represented as a series of ASCII numeric characters consisting of an optional leading sign (+ or -), the digits, and an optional decimal point. At least one digit is required. Any value containing a decimal point must include at least one digit to the left of the decimal point. The total length of the value must be between 1 and 16 characters.
